payload.summary: Added cache-focused tests to authorization-service tests covering cache miss population, cache-hit avoidance of permission loads, stale-refresh behavior with cache overwrite, and tenant-scoped cache key isolation, while keeping existing behavior tests intact.

targetedCommand.name: npm test
targetedCommand.purpose: Execute the repository’s required test pipeline (build + node test runner) against updated authorization cache tests.

payload.expectedFailure: Existing implementation never reads or writes AuthorizationCache, so new tests expecting cache hits/misses, load minimization, and snapshot refresh fail to observe those behaviors.
